tool.name: SnpEff Databases
tool.description: Read the list of available SnpEff databases
tool.help:
This tool updates the list of SnpEff databases for the SnpEff Download data manager. It should only need to be run once for a SnpEff version, since it populates the SnpEff Download data manager from the SnpEff config file.
For information about SnpEff and its databases see: https://pcingola.github.io/SnpEff/snpeff/introduction/#databases.
